form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth behind Dublins Dragonfly at Miami Valley Raceway over 1609m in a NW2001L4 on March 12 at $18.80. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing second behind Jett Rink at this track over 1609m in a NW1500L4 on April 7 at $1.90. Nicely placed to take this out.
